channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Orioles swept by Royals in wild-card series to extend playoff game losing streak to 10
item.description: The Kansas Royals swept the Baltimore Orioles in the AL Wild Card series with a 2-1 victory on Wednesday, ending the Orioles' season without a playoff win.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Witt gets another big hit to send the Royals into the ALDS with a 2-game sweep of the Orioles
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — Bobby Witt Jr. beat out an infield single to drive in the go-ahead run and send the Kansas City Royals into an AL Division Series with a 2-1 victory over the Baltimore Orioles on Wednesday for a two-game sweep of their Wild Card Series.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Titans to stick with Will Levis as starting quarterback despite early struggles, coach says
item.description: Despite Mason Rudolph's strong showing on Monday night, Tennessee Titans head coach Brian Callahan says the team is sticking with Will Levis as QB1.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Dodgers to start Jack Flaherty in Game 1 of NLDS, with Yoshinobu Yamamoto set for Game 2
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Jack Flaherty will start Game 1 of this weekend’s National League Division Series for the Los Angeles Dodgers, with rookie Yoshinobu Yamamoto set for Game 2.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Detroit Tigers sweep Astros to advance to second round of playoffs
item.description: Andy Ibáñez hit a tiebreaking three-run double in Detroit’s four-run eighth inning, and the Tigers swept the Houston Astros with a 5-2 victory in Game 2 of their AL Wild Card Series.
item.dc:creator: Kristie Rieken, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Lightning prospects fight for roster spots ahead of Panthers preseason matchup
item.description: Preseason means players fighting for a roster spot get a chance to impress coaches. Center Conor Geekie is one of those players who head coach Jon Cooper thinks highly of.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC

item.title: Dream fire Tanisha Wright in WNBA's 3rd coach firing since playoffs began
item.description: The Atlanta Dream have fired coach Tanisha Wright after three seasons, the franchise announced Wednesday. Wright took over the team in 2022 and helped them reach the playoffs the last two seasons. The Dream lost both years in the opening round of the postseason, including to New York last month.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Antonio Pierce won't address speculation surrounding Raiders and Davante Adams' future
item.description: Las Vegas Raiders coach Antonio Pierce channeled his inner Bill Belichick after being asked repeatedly about star wide receiver Davante Adams’ status with the team.
item.dc:creator: Mark Anderson, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Mbappé can't rescue Real Madrid in Champions League loss to Lille
item.description: Kylian Mbappé came off the bench but could not stop defending champion Real Madrid losing 1-0 at unheralded Lille in the revamped Champions League.
item.dc:creator: Jerome Pugmire, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Second fan files lawsuit claiming ownership of Shohei Ohtani's 50-50 baseball
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — The claim to Shohei Ohtani's potentially lucrative 50th home run ball grew more complicated this week, with a second fan filing a lawsuit asserting he had possession of the historic baseball.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jets star shares cryptic post amid Davante Adams trade rumors
item.description: New York Jets cornerback Sauce Gardner fueled trade rumors on Tuesday after it was reported that Davante Adams informed the Las Vegas Raiders that he preferred to be traded.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Former Poland goalkeeper Szczesny joins Barcelona after announcing his retirement in August
item.description: BARCELONA, Spain (AP) — Barcelona added former Poland goalkeeper Wojciech Szczesny to its squad on Wednesday to help make up for the absence of the injured Marc-André ter Stegen.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: RSL looks to solidify playoff seeding against Minnesota
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Real Salt Lake has already clinched an MLS playoff spot, but considering RSL is 6-1-2 all-time at home in the postseason, they want that home field advantage in the first round.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Aggies face another tough challenge at #21 Boise State
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The Aggies have had two weeks to stew in that second half collapse at Temple when they got outscored in the second half 28-8 to fall to 1-3 on the season. "Obviously, our record is not what we want," said quarterback Spencer Petras on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Baseball legend Pete Rose dies at 83
item.description: Pete Rose, Major League Baseball’s all-time hits leader who endured a lifetime ban for betting on the sport, has died at age 83, his agent Jeff Lenkov confirmed to KTLA 5 News. According to TMZ, Rose died at his home in Las Vegas on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, KTLA 5

item.title: Baseball legend Pete Rose dies at 83
item.description: (KRON) -- Baseball legend Pete Rose died Monday at the age of 83. Rose's complicated legacy includes being MLB's all-time hits leader but being banned from the league for gambling on games. He died Monday morning in his Las Vegas home, TMZ said. The outlet did not reveal a cause of death.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Mets reach playoffs, beat Braves to cap comeback from 22-33 start
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Four months after dropping 11 games under .500, the New York Mets earned a playoff berth a day after the regular season was supposed to end.
item.dc:creator: PAUL NEWBERRY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Bucs prep for Falcons in Primetime TNF after big win over Eagles
item.description: After beating the Philadelphia Eagles the Tampa Bay Buccaneers now lead the NFC South with a 3-1 record.
item.dc:creator: C.H., WFLA, NBC

item.title: Broncos def. Jets on the road 10-9
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — Week 4 of the NFL season saw the Cincinnati Bengals claim their first victory of the year with a 34-24 win. Wide receiver Ja'Marr Chase showcased his speed and balance, sprinting 63 yards for a touchdown.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Fred Warner's pick-6 helps the 49ers snap a 2-game skid with a 30-13 win over the Patriots
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — Even after all the success the San Francisco 49ers had the past few seasons, a two-game skid and a string of injuries early in the season can raise some doubts for any team. Considered those answered for one day at least.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Chicago Bears rough up the Rams, move to 2-2
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago Bears offense played turnover-free football and the defense was as advertised in a win over the Los Angeles Rams Sunday at Soldier Field.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Chiefs' Harrison Butker jersey sales exceed Travis Kelce, Aaron Rodgers
item.description: In the offseason, Butker shot to national prominence after a speech on his Catholic beliefs at Benedictine College, a Catholic university in Kansas.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Padres postseason tickets on sale now
item.description: Tickets for 2024 postseason games went on sale to the public on Saturday, with access limited to residents in nearby geographical locations. The Padres still have two games left in the regular season, and fans can watch for free all weekend.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Hoop Dreams turns 30 as stars reflect on groundbreaking documentary
item.description: CHICAGO — Thirty Years ago, the sports documentary Hoop Dreams was released in theaters, quickly becoming a sensation. Acclaimed film critic Roger Ebert called it "one of the best films about American life I have ever seen.
item.dc:creator: Josh Frydman, WGN 9

item.title: A man says Ohtani's 50-50 home run ball was ripped out of his hands. Now, he's suing
item.description: The world's best baseball player completed Major League Baseball's first-ever 50-50 season last week, and one fan will get rich from it.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, Fox 5

item.title: Meet the champions: These are the top stars of WWE NXT on the CW Network
item.description: Who is the future of sports entertainment? To answer that question, one must look to the top tier of NXT, the champions who have overcome the odds and claimed bragging rights over every superstar on the brand.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, ABC 4
